text: Most people won't tell you that getting back in shape requires sacrifice and pain. But I'll tell you - it's worth it. I'm on day 10 of my gym journey and I'm still struggling, but I see progress. Don't believe the social media perfection, believe the grind.
decision_reason: meets pillar and trigger requirements, empathetic tone
